commands.review_summary:
This PR adds eager creation of `skills` and `.agents/skills` inside `ensureAgentWorkspace` so sandbox read-only skill mounts have host sources before first container launch.

PR surface: Source +5. Total +5 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection. The `rw` sandbox setup path only creates the workspace root before mount resolution, and the added `.agents/skills` directory is visible to the existing skip-bootstrap content-evidence scanner.

target.title: fix(sandbox): create skills dirs before first container launch
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #94425

When a new agent workspace has no `skills` or `.agents/skills` directories, the read-only mount instructions are silently skipped by `resolveReadOnlyWorkspaceSkillMounts`. This creates a **first-write vulnerability window** where the agent can freely execute `mkdir skills` and write executable scripts before the protective `ro` mount is applied on restart.

## Change

`src/agents/workspace.ts` — +5 lines

Create both `skills` and `.agents/skills` directories eagerly during `ensureAgentWorkspace`, guaranteeing they exist before any sandbox container spawns. The Docker `ro` mount lock now always applies from the very first launch.

## Testing

pnpm not available locally — relying on CI verification.
